title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindustan Petroleum - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindustan Petroleum - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindustan Petroleum:
Hindustan Petroleum is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Petroleum!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
